testsuite.name: com.assetguard.domain.usecase.ai.SendMessageUseCaseTest

testcase.name: send message returns assistant reply with deepLink
send message saves user message then assistant reply
send message passes chat history to gateway
send message with BUSINESS userType passes correct userType to gateway
send message with null deepLink still succeeds
